---
title: "Police Fairness, Anger and Support for Violent and Non‐Violent Disruptive Actions in Chile"
description: "Estudio sobre la justicia policial, la ira y el apoyo a acciones disruptivas violentas y no violentas en Chile."
venue: "Journal of Community & Applied Social Psychology, 35(6)"
tipo: articulo
date: "2025-01-01"
author: "Varela, M., Bilali, R., Bahamondes, J., Figueiredo, A., Gerber, M.M., Godfrey, E."
authors: [joaquin-bahamondes, ana-figueiredo, monica-gerber]
reference: "Varela, M., Bilali, R., Bahamondes, J., Figueiredo, A., Gerber, M.M., & Godfrey, E. (2025). Police Fairness, Anger and Support for Violent and Non‐Violent Disruptive Actions in Chile. *Journal of Community & Applied Social Psychology*, 35(6), e70185."
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
    body-classes: publicacion-page
---

# Police Fairness, Anger and Support for Violent and Non‐Violent Disruptive Actions in Chile

Estudio sobre la justicia policial, la ira y el apoyo a acciones disruptivas violentas y no violentas en Chile.

**Autores OLES:** [Joaquín Bahamondes](../equipo/joaquin-bahamondes.html), [Ana Figueiredo](../equipo/ana-figueiredo.html), [Monica M. Gerber](../equipo/monica-gerber.html)

**Fecha:** 2025.

## Referencia sugerida

Varela, M., Bilali, R., Bahamondes, J., Figueiredo, A., Gerber, M.M., & Godfrey, E. (2025). Police Fairness, Anger and Support for Violent and Non‐Violent Disruptive Actions in Chile. *Journal of Community & Applied Social Psychology*, 35(6), e70185.

[← Volver a Publicaciones](index.qmd)
